name: WebPageTest
description: Industry-standard performance testing service from Catchpoint. Runs Lighthouse PLUS its own waterfall analysis, filmstrip capture, video comparison, and multi-run averages from real test locations around the world (~40 regions). Async — submit a test with run_test, get a test ID, then poll get_result until status='completed'.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: WebPageTest API key (get one at webpagetest.org/getkey.php)

tools.name: run_test
tools.description: Submit a new test against a URL. Returns a test ID + URLs for the JSON result and the HTML result page. Set runs > 1 for averaged measurements (each run consumes a credit). Supports custom locations, browsers, connection profiles, scripted user journeys, and Lighthouse-only mode. Returns immediately — poll get_result with the returned testId until the data is ready.

f.description: Response format. JSON is what you almost always want.

runs.description: Number of test runs to average (each consumes one test credit)

fvonly.description: 0 = test first AND repeat view, 1 = first view only (faster, half the credits)

location.description: Test location + browser, e.g. 'Dulles:Chrome', 'London:Chrome', 'ec2-eu-central-1:Chrome'. See /getLocations.php for the full list.

connectivity.description: Connection profile (sets bandwidth + latency + packet loss)

lighthouse.description: Run a Lighthouse audit alongside the WPT measurements

label.description: Free-text label for this test (shown in the UI)

private.description: Hide from the public test history

block.description: Comma-separated list of substrings to block from being requested

script.description: WPT scripting language for multi-step user journeys (login + measure)

pingback.description: URL to call when the test is complete (avoids polling)

tools.name: get_result
tools.description: Get the result of a previously submitted test. Poll this until `data.statusCode === 200` (test complete). Returns the full WPT result including Lighthouse JSON (under `data.lighthouse`), waterfall data, video frames, and per-run metrics.

tools.name: test_status
tools.description: Lightweight status check for a running test. Returns just the queue position + status code without the full result body — much smaller than get_result while polling.

tools.name: cancel_test
tools.description: Cancel a queued or running test.

tools.name: list_locations
tools.description: List the available test locations (geographic regions + browsers + queue depth). Use this to pick a location that matches your real users' geography.

tools.name: test_balance
tools.description: Get the current API key's remaining test credits.
